arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he has not been able to 'bring the best out of' Darwin Nunez - with the Reds No 9 scoring just two league goals so far this season
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Reds No 9 has scored just four goals all season - only two of those coming in the Premier League - and has fallen out of favour in terms of the current Liverpool starting XI.

arts.ttl: Andrew Robertson decision made as £64m man returns: Liverpool predicted XI v Brentford
arts.sum: Liverpool will hope to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table to seven points when they head to Brentford on Saturday....

Liverpool megastars Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk are on the verge of signing for Al-Hilal, according to Saudi sports pundit Khaled Al-Shenaif. Despite sitting comfortably atop the Premier League standings, Liverpool are facing a potential doomsday scenario with key players Van Dijk, Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold out of contract at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota injury: Progress and potential return date
arts.sum: Injury news and potential return date for Liverpool forward Diogo Jota.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's five most expensive January transfers of all time
arts.sum: Carroll became Liverpool’s most expensive signing of all time when he joined the club for €41m after registering 11 goals and eight assists during the first half of the 2010-11 Premier League season. However, he failed to hit the heights expected of him at Anfield, and after only managing 11 goals in 58 appearances for Liverpool, he left the club to join West Ham United in 2012.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Brentford - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their clash with Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday.
Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that VfL Wolfsburg managing director Peter Christiansen has eyes for another Danish international.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister drops early Liverpool team news hint after Arne Slot strong defence
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister will be hoping to get Liverpool back to winning ways at Brentford on Saturday

arts.ttl: Saturday PL Predictions: Arsenal to edge closer to Liverpool?
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows provides his insight across Saturday's Premier League action where title-chasing Liverpool and Arsenal are hunting maximum points.

arts.ttl: Arsenal facing surprise Premier League competition in race for Brentford attacker?
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to face competition from Nottingham Forest for the services of Brentford attacker Yoane Wissa this month.
